title: oxytropis deflexa subsp. retrorsa
intro: Oxytropis deflexa subsp. retrorsa, also known as a type of milkvetch plant, is a legume species native to certain regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to its high content of glycosides and flavonoids. The health benefits of Oxytropis deflexa subsp. retrorsa include relief from various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the roots or leaves in water or alcohol to create teas, tinctures, or extracts for medicinal purposes.
